assertions.assertion: Creates a ProfileDataRequestContext with a subject ClaimsPrincipal containing a sub claim
assertions.rationale: new ProfileDataRequestContext(subject: subject, ...) where subject has JwtClaimTypes.Subject claim

assertions.assertion: Mocks an IUserRepository (or equivalent) to return known role values
Calls GetProfileDataAsync and asserts that context.IssuedClaims contains the expected role claims
Tests IsActiveAsync and asserts context.IsActive is set correctly based on the mock
assertions.rationale: Both true and false cases tested with Assert.True/Assert.False(context.IsActive)

assertions.assertion: Does NOT require a running IdentityServer — tests the service in isolation
assertions.rationale: Direct instantiation with mocked repository — no WebApplicationFactory or server
